ul.li: Offset Latency: ~5-10 microseconds context switch overhead.
Constraint: Use only when the CPU absolutely requires kernel results to compute the next host-side branch.
Optimization: Zero CPU cycles consumed. The Hardware Command Processor (CP) stalls the specific stream queue at the GPU front-end.
Optimization: Use in "Busy-Wait" loops where the CPU has secondary tasks (e.g., UI updates, Disk I/O) that can progress while waiting for hardware.
